requirement.title: REQ-1098
requirement.requirement: The load limitation is activated if the summation of [EM2_TrqMax_Rq_MSSE + actual combustion engine torque] exceeds the torque limit M_Grenz_pos equal [positive permissible torque + torque offset for torque limitation] for longer than a calibratable debounce time t_M_Grenz_pos (150 milliseconds; calibratable until 300 milliseconds).
